body: PT Puradelta Lestari Tbk (DMAS) recorded revenue of Rp1.92 trillion in 2023, with industrial land sales contributing Rp1.63 trillion and growing 16.3% year-on-year, and posted a net profit of Rp1.21 trillion. As of the first nine months of 2024, the company had already achieved a net profit of Rp1.23 trillion, representing 92.6% of its total net profit in 2023.
title: Hongky Jeffry Nantung, President Director of PT Puradelta Lestari, awarded Best CEO for driving company's significant growth in industrial land sales.

body: PT Astra Agro Lestari Tbk (AALI) has been recognized for its efforts to reduce pesticide use in palm oil cultivation, adopting natural food chains and biological control methods, and expanding conservation areas to 2.81 million m² in 2023. Despite fluctuating commodity prices, AALI's revenue increased 3.8% year-on-year and EBITDA grew 11.1% in September 2024, marking a positive recovery, and earning its President Director, Santosa, the Best CEO award at the Top CEO Indonesia Awards 2024.
title: Astra Agro Lestari's President Director Santosa Receives Award for Consistent Efforts in Reducing Pesticide Use in Palm Oil Plantation Industry

body: PT Bank Pembangunan Daerah Jawa Timur Tbk (BJTM) President Director Busrul Iman was awarded Best CEO for his success in boosting international banking transactions, with the bank's trade finance remittance products growing over 200% in 2023 and remittance transactions increasing 271.45% to IDR 2.76 trillion. BJTM recorded a net profit of IDR 1.47 trillion in 2023, with a compound annual growth rate of 1.32% per year, and remains a constituent of the Indeks52 stock index with a high dividend yield of 8.10%.
title: Bank Jatim's President Director Wins Best CEO Award for Boosting International Banking Transactions

body: Royke Tumilaar, President Director of PT Bank Negara Indonesia Tbk (BNI), was awarded Best CEO for his strong commitment to promoting financial inclusion, with BNI's initiatives such as BNI Agen46 and BNI Pandai reaching 20 million accounts and facilitating 85.5 million transactions worth IDR 59.9 trillion. Under Tumilaar's leadership, BNI has seen strong growth in assets, lending, and net profit, with a 5.75% year-on-year growth in lending and a 3.4% year-on-year increase in net profit.
title: BNI President Director Royke Tumilaar Wins Best CEO Award for Promoting Financial Inclusion in Indonesia
